title: Junior Instructional Designer at Ratna Sagar Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Junior Instructional Designer at Ratna Sagar Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Ratna Sagar Holdings Services. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Chandigarh-based team.

About Ratna Sagar Holdings Services:
Ratna Sagar Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ratna Sagar Holdings Services!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
